text: AI is rapidly changing the modern workplace. Many routine tasks are now automated, allowing employees to focus on more creative work. Productivity tools, such as smart scheduling assistants and data analysis software, help teams work faster and more efficiently. However, rather than replacing humans entirely, the most successful companies encourage human-AI collaboration, where AI handles data processing while people make strategic decisions. As a result, many jobs are changing. Some roles are disappearing, but new ones are emerging, such as AI trainers and ethics specialists. Workers who adapt and learn to use these tools will have a clear advantage in the future job market.
